---
name: Migration task
about: Track one migration unit with acceptance criteria
labels: [migration-task]

## Goal

What migration goal does this issue cover?

## Tasks

- [ ] Define acceptance criteria
- [ ] Make focused code/documentation changes
- [ ] Add/adjust tests
- [ ] Run required validation commands

## Impact area

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / Gradle
- [ ] Domain model
- [ ] Reducer
- [ ] ViewModel
- [ ] Compose UI
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI

## Definition of done

- [ ] Code is updated
- [ ] Tests pass (for changed paths)
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] PR is scoped to one migration unit

- Related file paths:
- Expected user-facing effect:
